name: should create a query for fantasy points from plays with specific route, weeks, rate type, and player filters
description: Test case for should create a query for fantasy points from plays with specific route, weeks, rate type, and player filters
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR')), "t0957f9aee7b52cb82affca7cd0206349" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2023.tm) as teams, "nfl_games"."year" from "player_gamelogs_year_2023" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_PRE_WEEK_1', '2023_PRE_WEEK_2', '2023_PRE_WEEK_3', '2023_PRE_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_5', '2023_REG_WEEK_6', '2023_REG_WEEK_7', '2023_REG_WEEK_8', '2023_REG_WEEK_9', '2023_REG_WEEK_10', '2023_REG_WEEK_11', '2023_REG_WEEK_12', '2023_REG_WEEK_13', '2023_REG_WEEK_14', '2023_REG_WEEK_15', '2023_REG_WEEK_16', '2023_REG_WEEK_17', '2023_REG_WEEK_18', '2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_POST_WEEK_2', '2023_POST_WEEK_3', '2023_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid"), "rate_game_c007d3ffe4dc" as materialized (select CONCAT(nfl_games.year, '_', nfl_games.week, '_', nfl_games.esbid) AS period_key, "nfl_games"."year", "role_union"."pid" as "pid", SUM(role_union.pts) AS measure_total from (select nfl_plays.bc_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.bc_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."route" in ('GO') union all select nfl_plays.psr_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.psr_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."route" in ('GO') union all select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.trg_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."route" in ('GO') union all select nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."route" in ('GO')) as "role_union" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "role_union"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) group by "role_union"."pid", CONCAT(nfl_games.year, '_', nfl_games.week, '_', nfl_games.esbid), "nfl_games"."year" having SUM(role_union.pts) > 0), "t89dc6e4537bffdac2dcf30f85035e684" as materialized (with "filtered_plays" as (select "nfl_plays"."bc_pid", "nfl_plays"."psr_pid", "nfl_plays"."trg_pid", "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid", "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."seas_type", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."rush_yds", "nfl_plays"."rush_td", "nfl_plays"."pass_yds", "nfl_plays"."pass_td", "nfl_plays"."recv_yds", "nfl_plays"."comp", "nfl_plays"."int", "nfl_plays"."first_down", "nfl_plays"."play_type", "nfl_plays"."fuml", "nfl_plays"."route" from "nfl_plays" where "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and ("nfl_plays"."bc_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."trg_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."route" in ('GO') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023)) select "pid", SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from (select * from (select "bc_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "bc_pid" is not null group by "bc_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "bc_stats" union all select * from (select "psr_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "psr_pid" is not null group by "psr_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "psr_stats" union all select * from (select "trg_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "trg_pid" is not null group by "trg_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "trg_stats" union all select * from (select "player_fuml_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(-1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "player_fuml_pid" is not null group by "player_fuml_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "fuml_stats") as "combined_stats" group by "pid", "seas_type", "year" having SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) > 0) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, SUM(rate_game_c007d3ffe4dc.measure_total) / NULLIF(MAX(t0957f9aee7b52cb82affca7cd0206349.rate_type_total_count), 0) AS fantasy_points_from_plays_0, "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t0957f9aee7b52cb82affca7cd0206349" on "t0957f9aee7b52cb82affca7cd0206349"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t0957f9aee7b52cb82affca7cd0206349"."year" = 2023 left join "rate_game_c007d3ffe4dc" on "rate_game_c007d3ffe4dc"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "rate_game_c007d3ffe4dc"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "t89dc6e4537bffdac2dcf30f85035e684" on "t89dc6e4537bffdac2dcf30f85035e684"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t89dc6e4537bffdac2dcf30f85035e684"."year" = 2023 where player.pos IN ('WR') AND player.fname || ' ' || player.lname = 'Stefon Diggs' group by player.fname, player.lname, "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
